disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapid onset over ~48 hours of a red, swollen, burning glans with intense local itching
trigger_question_examples: What has been happening and when did it start?
Can you describe how the tip looks and feels?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Over the last two days the head of my penis has gone red, puffy and swollen, and it itches and burns a lot.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Thick white clumpy discharge accumulating under the foreskin with a foul smell
trigger_question_examples: Is there any discharge or fluid?
Is there anything building up under the foreskin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, there's a thick white clumpy stuff collecting under the foreskin and it smells off.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The foreskin cannot be retracted because of the swelling
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to pull the foreskin back?
Does the swelling stop the skin moving?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No — it's too swollen and sore, I can't pull the skin back at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recently completed a 10-day course of broad-spectrum antibiotics for a sinus infection
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken any antibiotics or new medicines recently?
Have you been unwell or treated for anything else lately?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I just finished a 10-day course of antibiotics for a sinus infection about a week or so ago.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Stinging pain on passing urine (dysuria) but still able to void
trigger_question_examples: Does it hurt when you pass urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It stings when I wee, but I can still go.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever and the redness is limited to the tip — it is not spreading up the shaft
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers, shakes or chills?
Is the redness spreading up the shaft of the penis?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers or shakes, and the redness is just at the tip — it hasn't crept up the shaft.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Able to pass urine — has not reached complete inability to void
trigger_question_examples: Are you still able to pass urine when you need to?
Have you become completely unable to wee?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can still pass urine, it just stings — I'm not completely blocked up.
